/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG CMakeFiles/outpost_tests.dir/tests/test_ring_buffer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/outpost_tests.dir/tests/test_parsers.cpp.o CMakeFiles/outpost_tests.dir/tests/test_storage.cpp.o CMakeFiles/outpost_tests.dir/tests/test_rules.cpp.o -o outpost_tests  liboutpost_lib.a lib/libgtest_main.a _deps/spdlog-build/libspdlog.a _deps/yaml-cpp-build/libyaml-cpp.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libssl.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcrypto.so -lpq -lpthread /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libssl.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcrypto.so lib/libgtest.a
